name: checkout-click
delta: Original: proceeds into the private Shopify checkout flow — not reproducible statically. Clone: shows a placeholder alert explaining checkout isn't wired to a real store, matching the documented approximation in prompt.md.

name: cart-qty-change
trigger: change the quantity number input on a cart row
delta: Updates the row's line total and persists to localStorage. Reproduced with an input change handler calling window.DoggyCart.setQty(index, qty) then re-rendering.

name: cart-remove-click
trigger: click the ✕ remove control on a cart row
delta: Removes the row and updates the header badge count. Reproduced with window.DoggyCart.remove(index) then re-rendering.
